name: Async Race Condition Detection
description: Agent must identify and fix a race condition in concurrent async operations

input.task: Debug and fix race condition in concurrent user fetch and cache update
input.buggyCode: async function getUser(id) { if (!cache[id]) { const user = await fetchUser(id); cache[id] = user; } return cache[id]; }
input.scenario: Two simultaneous calls to getUser(1) both trigger fetchUser because cache check happens before await

expectedBehavior: Identify the race condition: cache check before async operation completes
Understand the timeline: both callers check cache (empty), both call fetchUser, both update cache
Implement proper concurrency guard: use a Promise map to deduplicate in-flight requests
Test with concurrent calls to verify single fetch per ID
Understand trade-offs: Promise.all vs per-request caching vs database transactions
